title: Termination of Employment: Reduction in Force
description: When the district needs to reduce the number of employees due to budget changes, program cuts, or declining enrollment, this policy sets the rules for how those decisions are made. It ensures the process is carried out in a fair and consistent way, rather than on a case-by-case basis. Community members may notice changes in staffing or available programs when a reduction in force occurs, so understanding this policy helps explain how those decisions happen.
